[Premise System]
A series of fantasy village images.

[Spatial System]
Village, forest, river.

[Character System]
Young traveler.

[Color System]
Blue and gold.

[Medium System]
Film still.

[Composition System]
Wide shots.

[Lighting and Atmosphere System]
Soft light.

[Narrative and Emotion System]
Nostalgia.

[Quality and Exclusion System]
Avoid low quality.
